title: cola altissima
intro: Cola altissima, also known as the kola tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Cola altissima include its seeds, which contain caffeine and other xanthines, making it a traditional remedy for treating fatigue, headache, and other conditions. The health benefits of Cola altissima include its ability to improve mental clarity, increase energy levels, and aid in digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Cola altissima is often prepared as a tea, powder, or extract for use in traditional medicine, and is also used in some modern herbal preparations due to its stimulatory and adaptogenic properties.
